title: cotula sericea var. discolor
intro: Cotula sericea var. discolor, also known as woolly cotula, is a variety of the Cotula sericea plant, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The woolly cotula plant has been used to treat wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and promoting healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and topical applications, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
